notes: Captured expanded `orderUpdate` live parity for the 2025-01-supported simple update fields: order email, PO number, note, tags, custom attributes, shipping address, and order metafields, plus immediate downstream `order(id:)` visibility. Shopify 2025-01 rejects `phone` as an `OrderInput` field, so phone remains read-only context in this scenario; billing address is not exposed on `OrderInput`.

expectedDifferences.reason: Shopify returns the live order update timestamp; the proxy uses its deterministic staged-order timestamp while preserving timestamp shape.
The downstream read observes the proxy's deterministic staged-order timestamp instead of Shopify's live update timestamp.
